description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a square base and a tall, conical body. The surface is visibly worn and dirty, with scuff marks, faded areas, and patches of white residue, indicating extensive outdoor use. A single, wide, horizontal reflective stripe encircles the cone near its midpoint, though the stripe is partially faded and chipped. The tip of the cone is slightly rounded and appears solid, with no attachments or openings. The base is thick, flat, and textured, providing stability and resistance to tipping. No logos or text are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with a square base, a single faded reflective stripe, and visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cone's orange color, a faded reflective stripe, and a dirty, scuffed surface with a mostly intact tip.
description_view_1: This side reveals a darker, more shadowed surface with a prominent white patch on the reflective stripe and more pronounced wear.
description_view_2: This angle highlights a large white scuff on the reflective stripe and a generally faded, dirty appearance.
description_view_3: The back view displays the widest white patch on the reflective stripe and the most faded, dirty surface overall.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, horizontal, faded white reflective stripe encircles the cone near its midpoint.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is slightly rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, flat, and textured, made of the same plastic material, providing stability and resistance to tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears worn, dirty, and faded, with visible scuff marks and patches of discoloration.
